notes: Buggy. Can't run campaign mode, game freezes when playing intro video. Tutorial and skirmish mode are working with some crashes when returning from game session to the menu. Tried Nvidia 415 driver, 396, windowed mode, same problem.
title: Steel Division: Normandy 44

notes: No issues in Skirmish mode. Played on High specs.
title: Steel Division: Normandy 44

notes: One of my more regularly played games and can confirm it works perfectly out-of-the-box.
title: Steel Division: Normandy 44

notes: Skirmish runs fine, campaign freezes when intro video starts playing after 1-2 seconds. If you press escape as soon as video starts you can skip it and play campaign as usual.
title: Steel Division: Normandy 44

notes: The cursor reverted back to Linux cursor, thus not showing the cover quality, and after 30 minutes, the game muted. I did not find any easy solutions.
title: Steel Division: Normandy 44

notes: Sometimes the mouse icon becomes stale, i.e. issuing command (pressing y or so) won't change the cursor type. The mouse still works though, but it's a little annoying. Also videos on campaign mode do not play - the game freezes after a few secs of the campaign video. Make sure to skip them. Lastly, the game doesn't start - it gets stuck in the "ad" for their expansion. You have to forcefully close that.
title: Steel Division: Normandy 44

notes: The game will hang during the pre-mission cutscenes, but you can skip them with the Escape key and after that it runs well. The only thing I've run into is the cursor switching from the ingame skin to the regular system cursor. This is a bit annoying because the color of the cursor gives you strategic information, but not too bad. Haven't figured out what causes it.
title: Steel Division: Normandy 44
